nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and research accelerator
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable source requiring verification
nodes.grounding_span: I give it a rough rundown of my codebase's architecture and what I envision the solution being

nodes.label: AI for boilerplate and routine tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for core logic and complex coding
nodes.grounding_span: I may ask it to prepare some boilerplate code, but I like to code all the other logic myself

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I am wary of potential hallucinations or logic issues if I ask AI to code anything other than boilerplate

nodes.label: AI as pair-programming collaborator
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous agent replacing human judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I envision using it as almost a pair-programming buddy in the future to bounce ideas off of

nodes.label: Maintaining personal expertise and codebase knowledge
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI leading to skill atrophy
nodes.grounding_span: I would want to keep my skills sharp in those areas so that I am able know what AI is doing

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It is a huge productivity boost to just use it for boilerplate

nodes.label: Code quality and correctness
nodes.grounding_span: The AI was able to help me pinpoint the code that was causing a side effect

nodes.label: Personal competence and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: This also ensures I know all the logic of my codebase since I wrote it myself

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as debugging aid
nodes.grounding_span: The AI was able to help me pinpoint the code that was causing a side effect

nodes.label: Frustration with AI misunderstanding and hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: The AI seemed to be misunderstanding the problem... some of them did not appear to exist upon researching them

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about future AI collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I envision using it as almost a pair-programming buddy in the future

nodes.label: Resistance to offloading significant coding to AI
nodes.grounding_span: I am hesitant to offload any significant sections to it

nodes.label: Context sanitization and problem abstraction
nodes.grounding_span: I will give it a cleaned up version of the problem I am facing that will remove most of the context

nodes.label: Iterative refinement and verification
nodes.grounding_span: I will read over the correspondence and if there are any pieces I want edited, I will ask it to edit that specific piece
